1. npx @claude-flow/cli@latest agent list --includeTerminated 2>/dev/null || echo "agent list no disponible"
2. npx @claude-flow/cli@latest system info 2>/dev/null || echo "system info no disponible"
3. npx @claude-flow/cli@latest config list --scope system 2>/dev/null || echo "config no disponible"

Retorna TODA la salida sin filtrar.
